word: G1530 - εἰσπηδάω - eispēdáō - ice-pay-dah'-o - Run in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἰσπηδάω

- Transliteration: Eispedao

- Phonetic: ice-pay-dah'-o

- Definition:

1. to spring in, to rush in impetuously

- Origin: from G1519 and pedao (to leap)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1519 and πηδάω pē daō (to leap); to rush in: - run (spring) in.
